title: Dark Data Medicine: The Open Negative Results Registry
description: An open, structured, and freely accessible registry of negative and null results in medical and biomedical research. This snapshot corresponds to a tagged GitHub release, archived on Zenodo to provide a permanent, citable DOI.
notes: To activate: connect this GitHub repository to Zenodo at https://zenodo.org/account/settings/github/, then create a tagged GitHub Release. Zenodo will automatically archive it and mint a DOI using this metadata.
